target.label: Prerequisite check (Docker runtime + Claude auth + gh auth) with pointer errors

rationale: Epic-2-ships-envelope-composes-upstream-external-services class story (TENTH Epic 2 delivery; FIRST instance of multi-external-service-composition class — distinct from Stories 2.8/2.9 single-OAuth-endpoint class) shipping 1 NEW shared primitive under `packages/devbox/scripts/prereq-check.sh` (iter-248: ~120 LOC; 0755; shared primitive NOT `<verb>-host.sh` per SC-1 naming; structural ancestors env-check.sh + reload-egress.sh) + 1 NEW `devbox:prereq:check` entry in repo-root `package.json` (between `devbox:env:check` and `ralph:build` per Task 2) + 17 shim wire-ins (15 Tier-1 block-swap across `build.sh`/`rebuild.sh`/`start.sh`/`stop.sh`/`clean.sh`/`shell.sh`/`attach.sh`/`status.sh`/`logs.sh`/`monitor-host.sh`/`whitelist-host.sh`/`claude-host.sh`/`gh-auth-host.sh` + 2 Tier-2 block-swap across `ralph-build-host.sh`/`ralph-plan-host.sh` + 2 Tier-1 prepend-only across `restart.sh` transitive-delegate + `env-check.sh` NEW gate) + 1 NEW `INV-devbox-prereq-check` manifest entry (30th entry; first new manifest entry in Epic 2 story-scoped surface — iter-239 retrofit extracted `lib/*.sh` but did NOT add a manifest entry) + 1 NEW `docs/invariants/devbox-prereq-check.md` authoritative doc (8 H2 sections: Three-check contract / Exit-code schema / Tier contract / No-partial-bypass / Fresh-fork first-run behavior / Alpine probe image / Consumption / Extension; hashed into contentHash `eb5b9db25e0afc77c4caf38c8bf60b37921a76df2ea030c91f66e848b0d8fe40`) + 1 NEW `INVARIANTS.md` H3 section `### Devbox prerequisite check (Story 2.10)` with anchor bullet + 1 NEW README H2 `## Prerequisite check (Story 2.10)` (sibling of Story 2.9 `## gh CLI authentication (Story 2.9)`) + 1 NEW AGENTS.md H3 `### Prerequisite check (Story 2.10)` (sibling of Story 2.9 `### gh CLI authentication (Story 2.9)` under § Devbox iteration environment). Five ACs — all P2 per FR14n Epic-2-substrate precedent (Stories 2.1-2.9 uniform P2). TWENTIETH cumulative trace-WAIVED precedent extending Story 2.9 iter-242 nineteenth (Stories 1.7 iter-4 + 1.8 iter-3 + 1.9 iter-3 + 1.10 iter-46 + 1.11 iter-57 + 1.12 iter-64 + 1.13 iter-71 + 1.14 iter-78 + 1.15 iter-85 + 1.16 iter-92 → 2.1 iter-126 → 2.2 iter-149 → 2.3 iter-159 → 2.4 iter-175 → 2.5 iter-188 → 2.6 iter-202 → 2.7 iter-224 → 2.8 iter-231 → 2.9 iter-242 → 2.10 iter-249 = TWENTIETH cumulative trace-WAIVED; TWENTY-FIRST ATDD-skip-trace-WAIVED pairing overall). Hybrid ground-(a)-(b)-(c) variant-(iii) + ground-(c) variant `external-service-owns-behavior-under-test` with MULTI-SERVICE composition (FIRST application) — AC 1 Docker Desktop install-URL + Docker Engine daemon-reachability (Docker Inc. owns install flow + Docker Engine owns `docker info` exit semantics); AC 2 Story 2.8 Anthropic OAuth flow already operator-workstation-verified at iter-230 + Story 2.5 `keel_home_dev` named-volume persistence already operator-workstation-verified at iter-188 (token-presence-at-path existence owned jointly); AC 3 Story 2.9 GitHub OAuth flow already operator-workstation-verified at iter-237/244 + Story 2.5 named-volume persistence (same joint-ownership); AC 4 all-satisfied silent pass composes all three upstreams + Story 2.7 `docker attach` envelope (Epic 3 in-container TUI reduces to `sleep infinity` until Epic 3 materializes per Story 2.7 SC-2); AC 5 composite fresh-fork walkthrough composes all above + `docs/invariants/devbox-prereq-check.md § No-partial-bypass` spec-declared contract. (a) substrate-verification covers AC 1 install-URL + AC 2/3/4/5 composite-message + exit-code surfaces at iteration-env-safe layer via 9 stub-docker smokes from workspace-based `<workspace>/.ralph-smoke/shim/docker` argv-driven stub keyed off `$KEEL_SMOKE_MODE` (modes: `docker_down` / `tier1_pass_no_volume` / `tier2_pass_both` / `tier2_pass_claude_only` / `tier2_pass_gh_only`): (i) Tier 1 docker-down → exit 8 + verbatim `install Docker Desktop: https://docs.docker.com/desktop/install/` (AC 1 URL byte-exact); (ii) Tier 1 docker-up → exit 0 silent; (iii) Tier 2 volume-absent fresh-fork first-run → exit 2 + composite Claude-before-gh stderr ordering matching Stories 2.8 → 2.9 landing sequence (AC 5 aggregation); (iv) Tier 2 both tokens present → exit 0 silent (AC 4 all-satisfied); (v) Tier 2 Claude-only present → exit 2 + gh-missing pointer only (AC 3 isolation); (vi) Tier 2 gh-only present → exit 2 + Claude-missing pointer only (AC 2 isolation); (vii) No-arg default → Tier 2 behaviour; (viii) Unknown arg → usage + exit 2 (AC 5 no-partial-bypass verified — no silent-ignore of unknown args); (ix) `pnpm run 2>&1 | grep devbox:prereq:check` → 1 match (Task 2 wiring smoke). `bash -n` on all 18 edited/new scripts: clean. `pnpm keel-invariants:check` EXIT=0 after Task 5 landing + collateral `INV-prek-prepare-lifecycle` contentHash bump (`d89072918e…→dc5ed31b8a…`) tracking the root `package.json` edit — whole-file content hash binds per Story 1.9 semantic; this discipline is the novel discovery of iter-248 and forecast-applicable to Stories 2.11..2.17 + Epic 3+ that add pnpm verbs. (b) no test runner at Story 2.10 time — Epic 13 scope; recursive probe for vitest.config.*/jest.config.*/playwright.config.*/cypress.config.*/pyproject.toml/go.mod/Gemfile/Cargo.toml/csproj returns zero matches at iter-249; stack detection returns none (Epic 13 delivers framework landing per twenty precedents). (c) HYBRID variant-(iii) spec-declared-CR-substitution — Story 2.10 § Dev-agent guardrails + 17 pinned scope-clarifications (SC-1 through SC-17 covering FR1 non-toggle-able invariant extension to 18-shim total surface + SC-2 upstream Docker Desktop owns install path + hardcoded URL at 1.0 + SC-3 filesystem-based token probe existence-not-validity + SC-4/SC-7 alpine:3.19 pin with manual Renovate-tracking + SC-5 composite-message aggregation within Tier 2 + Tier 1 fails fast + SC-6 exit-code schema extension `0`/`2`/`8`/`12` + SC-8 `unset COMPOSE_PROJECT_NAME` defensive posture + SC-9 no signal trapping + SC-10 VOLUME_NAME env-var derivation + SC-11 17-shim wire-in required for AC 5 + SC-12 NEW shared primitive first story-scoped `_lib.sh`-trajectory lift + SC-13 no compose/Dockerfile/entrypoint edits + SC-14 no ralph.py TUI changes + SC-15 no token content inspection + SC-16 --help not required + SC-17 read-only posture on Stories 2.6/2.7/2.8/2.9 README + AGENTS.md sections) + forthcoming /bmad-code-review (args: "2") adversarial envelope (Blind Hunter / Edge Case Hunter / Acceptance Auditor fan-out against cumulative Story 2.10 substrate diff: 1 new primitive + 1 new authoritative doc + 1 new INV manifest entry + 17 shim edits + collateral package.json + INVARIANTS.md H3 + README H2 + AGENTS.md H3 — forecast 0-3 PATCH opener + 0-1 closure re-run per Story 2.7 iter-226 + Story 2.8 iter-233 + Story 2.9 iter-244 cumulative precedent; Story 2.10 is FIFTH one-pass ZERO-PATCH CR precedent candidate if pattern holds under novel multi-shim-edit + new-INV + alpine-probe surface — wider forecast band than Stories 2.8/2.9 because Story 2.10 has FOUR novel-surface vectors vs. single-vector in 2.8/2.9). (c) VARIANT `external-service-owns-behavior-under-test` with MULTI-SERVICE composition for AC 1/2/3/4/5 — AC 1's `Docker runtime reachable` + `install Docker Desktop: <URL>` owned by Docker Inc. (install flow + `https://docs.docker.com/desktop/install/` docs URL) + Docker Engine (docker info exit semantics); AC 2's `probe /home/dev/.claude/.credentials.json` owned jointly by upstream `@anthropic-ai/claude-code@2.1.116` (token file write path + format; Dockerfile:119) + Story 2.5 `keel_home_dev` named volume (persistence substrate); AC 3's `probe /home/dev/.config/gh/hosts.yml` owned jointly by apt-installed upstream `gh` CLI (token file write path; Dockerfile:123-136) + Story 2.5 named-volume; AC 4's `Ralph loop starts normally` owned by Story 2.7 `docker attach` envelope + Epic 3 in-container TUI (reduces to `sleep infinity` until Epic 3 materializes per Story 2.7 SC-2); AC 5's `composite missing-item list + no partial bypass` owned jointly by wrapper envelope (composite aggregation code path) + `docs/invariants/devbox-prereq-check.md § No-partial-bypass` spec-declared substrate-enforced contract. Story 2.10's wrapper can ONLY verify: (α) invocation envelope is correctly assembled (9 smokes); (β) tier-dispatch branches correctly (--tier1 / --tier2 / default / unknown); (γ) exit codes + stderr messages AC-verbatim; (δ) no wrapper-side token content inspection (SC-15); (ε) no-bypass verified via grep absence + unknown-arg rejection. Full AC verification requires: live Docker Desktop install + fresh-fork state + live Stories 2.8/2.9 OAuth flows + host browser + real Anthropic + GitHub accounts + Epic 3 Story 3.7 halt-write consumer for operator-workstation-deferred-AC-completion. This is FIRST non-OAuth ground-(c) application in Epic 2 AND FIRST multi-external-service-composition application — AC 1's Docker install-URL ownership by Docker Inc. broadens the abstraction beyond OAuth-endpoint-owns-behavior (Stories 2.8/2.9) to install-path-owns-behavior (Story 2.10) + multi-service composition (Docker + Anthropic + GitHub + Story 2.5 substrate + Epic 3 consumer — five external-service / substrate dependencies orchestrated by one shared primitive). The deterministic FAIL signal (overall 0% < 80%) is a structural false-positive; no test runner is wired at Story 2.10 substrate stage. TWENTIETH CUMULATIVE TRACE-WAIVED PRECEDENT — TENTH Epic-2 trace-WAIVED + FIRST Epic-2-ships-envelope-composes-upstream-external-services class trace-WAIVED. Structural trace-artefact inheritance from Story 2.9 (~85% reasoning-cost savings per iter-242 template; mechanical adaptation to 2.10's 5-AC multi-service-composition class with 1 new primitive + 17 shim wire-ins + 1 new INV + 1 new authoritative doc; lower inheritance percentage than Stories 2.8/2.9's 90% because Story 2.10's novel-surface vectors are wider: (i) multi-shim refactor first such in Epic 2; (ii) first new `INV-*` manifest entry in Epic 2; (iii) alpine probe image pin first runtime image dependency; (iv) tier-dispatch argv semantics first multi-tier shim surface). Iteration-env-safe smokes ALL 9 PASSED at iter-248 (smoke-per-new-primitive ratio 9:1 — highest per-primitive density in Epic 2 substrate-smoke history, reflecting the argv + exit-code + stderr-ordering + dispatch-branch combinatorial surface). Live end-to-end fresh-fork first-run smokes (AC 1 install-URL surface + AC 2 token-file-probe + AC 3 token-file-probe + AC 4 all-satisfied silent + AC 5 composite walkthrough) are backend-A-only operator-workstation-deferred per § Testing Standards ground-(c) (Docker + Anthropic + GitHub endpoints + Docker substrate + Epic 3 consumer own the behaviors; DinD-B iteration env cannot safely exercise fresh Docker install + interactive OAuth + named-volume state transitions; Story 2.5 iter-187 + Story 2.6 iter-201/204/216/219 + Story 2.7 iter-223 + Stories 2.8 iter-230 + 2.9 iter-237 precedent cluster inherited). Story 2.10 advances Story State `in-dev → traced` (FR14n lifecycle matrix); next QUEUE item: `/bmad-create-story (args: "review")` post-dev SM requirements-satisfaction verification (`traced → sm-verified` or `sm-fixes-pending`) — forecast PATCH band 0-3 per iter-244 Story 2.9 ZERO-PATCH precedent + Story 2.10 wider novel-surface forecast; FIFTH one-pass ZERO-PATCH CR precedent candidate if post-dev SM PATCH count stays ≤3.
